kamo kitchens.description: Kamo Kitchens is a verified kitchen-renovator based in Whangārei, New Zealand.

better building.tagline: Auckland builders specialising in new homes, renovations, extra dwellings and development
better building.description: Better Building is a certified Auckland building company with over 25 years in the business. Director Daniel Park and his team specialise in new custom home builds, home renovations, extra dwellings (minor dwellings and sleep-outs), and residential development. Better Building offers fixed-price contracts with guided timelines and no surprises — from initial consultation and design through council consents, construction, and final Code of Compliance. Their team manages the full build process, including navigating Auckland Council consent requirements, so clients can focus on the outcome rather than the paperwork.

kallisto construction ltd.tagline: Auckland residential builder specialising in new builds and full renovations
kallisto construction ltd.description: Kallisto Construction Ltd is a licensed Auckland building company based in East Tamaki, serving homeowners across South and East Auckland. We specialise in residential new builds, whole-home renovations, and extensions. Our team of LBP-licensed builders brings a no-surprises approach to every project — detailed quotes, clear timelines, and quality workmanship backed by the Building Act warranties.
